name: Heavenly Chocolate Banana"creme" Log
recipeInstructions:
1. In a small bowl, combine the ricotta cheese, confectioner's sugar, and vanilla extract. Mix well.
2. Set one banana slice on a dessert plate.
3. Spread about one-third of the cheese mixture over the banana slice.
4. Place another banana slice on top and spread with half of the remaining cheese mixture.
5. Repeat steps 3-4 with the remaining ingredients, finishing with the banana slice covered in cheese mixture.
6. Drizzle chocolate syrup over the top and sprinkle coconut shreds evenly.
Calories per serving: 113 calories, 4 G protein, 3 G fat, 19 G carbohydrate, 88 mg calcium, 43 mg sodium, 10 mg cholesterol.
